title: Senior Teacher - IIT Delhi Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Delhi Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? IIT Delhi Global Group in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IIT Delhi Global Group:
IIT Delhi Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
